description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to change into the prototype directory, update Cabal and install only dependencies with tests enabled. Define two test-stage jobs named test:7.10 and test:8.0, each using the haskell:7.10 and haskell:8.0 Docker images respectively, and each executing ./gitlab-test.sh. Both jobs inherit the before_script and have no additional caches, artifacts, or rules.
